overview: Acharya College of Engineering (ACE) was established in 2009 by the PSS Educational Trust (also associated with the Munaga Educational Society) under the leadership of founder Pala Venkata Subbaiah. Located in D. Agraharam Village, Sri Avadhutha Kasinayana Brahmamgari Matam Mandal near Badvel, YSR Kadapa District, Andhra Pradesh, the institution is dedicated to rendering quality technical education to rural student populations and shaping skilled engineering professionals.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA). The polytechnic wing is recognized by the State Board of Technical Education and Training (SBTET), Andhra Pradesh.

nirfRanking.engineering: Not Ranked in Top NIRF Lists

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, Electrical & Electronics, Civil, Cyber Security)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹31,000 – ₹35,000 per year (Convener Quota standard base; total package scales higher under management profiles)

coursesAndFees.program: M.Tech (Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Specializations, VLSI Design)

placements.avgSalary: ₹2.20 LPA – ₹3.50 LPA (entry level metric ranges approx. )
placements.medianSalary: Data not systematically tracked via public university disclosures
placements.highestSalary: ₹4.50 LPA – ₹6.00 LPA based on regional off-campus drive selections
placements.highestDomestic: Data details localized to local enterprise alignments
placements.placementRate: Approximately 50% – 65% depending on branch and market cycle
placements.totalOffers: Varies by yearly pool graduation profiles
placements.companiesVisited: 15+ localized and national technical firms via joint pools

admissions.admissionProcess: Category A (70% seats) state-allotted allocations are executed by APSCHE using counseling channels based on AP EAPCET / AP POLYCET ranks. Category B management quotas are administered independently by college management following minimum eligibility criteria.
admissions.importantDates: State-level entrance testing and reporting cycles run periodically from June through September yearly.

campus.area: 10-acre scenic campus nestled near the hills along the National Highway
facilities: Four Multi-storeyed RCC Structures (10,700 sqm area)
Dedicated College Bus Fleets (covering Badvel, Kadapa, and Proddutur)
Playgrounds for Cricket and Volley Ball
campus.specialNote: The institute is situated 12 km outside Badvel town directly on the Mydukur-Badvel Highway, ensuring immediate transport accessibility via public state transport networks.

closingRanks2024.OC Boys: All eligible qualifying candidates on state ranking registers are considered based on phase distributions.

hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Generally factored directly into structural board layouts or charged locally
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) structural fee waivers for eligible backward and minority classes
Post-Matric student assistance packages from the Government of AP
Internal merit consideration for high qualifiers

contact.address: D. Agraharam Village, Rekalakunta, Mydukur - Badvel Highway, Brahmamgari Matam Mandal, Badvel, YSR Kadapa District - 516502, Andhra Pradesh, India
